framework: EIOPA Insurance Stress Test 2026 — Japan shadow run

scenarios.name: Pandemic (COVID-like resurgence)
scenarios.narrative: Novel respiratory pathogen, 18-month duration, 2 waves, mobility restrictions, property crime spike in weeks 8-20.

scenarios.name: Systemic Cyber Attack
scenarios.narrative: Coordinated ransomware against financial infrastructure; 72hr payment system outage; cascading impact on physical security systems and emergency dispatch.

scenarios.name: Severe Natural Catastrophe (Nankai Trough M9.1)
scenarios.narrative: Megathrust earthquake + tsunami across Pacific coast prefectures; 15M people affected; 4-6 week recovery window.

scenarios.name: Economic Downturn + Social Unrest
scenarios.narrative: GDP -4.5%, unemployment doubles, 6-month civil commotion episodes in major cities, polarized elections.

scenarios.name: Compound Tail Scenario (S2+S4)
scenarios.narrative: Cyber attack coincident with economic downturn — captures tail-dependence.
scenarios.combined_shocks_note: Non-additive combination using copula from compound_risk_tensor.json

methodology: Shocks applied to prefecture-level frequency and severity distributions in glm_frequency_severity.json, then aggregated nationally. Tail dependence modelled via Gaussian copula (rho=0.35) from compound_risk_tensor.json. Solvency ratio deltas computed against base SCR of 180%.
